targets.query:
from(bucket: "paxcounter")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "paxcounter")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.channel == "2" and r.kind == "hourly_avg")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: 1h, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> yield(name: "wifi_hourly_avg")

from(bucket: "paxcounter")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "paxcounter")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.channel == "3" and r.kind == "hourly_avg")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: 1h, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> yield(name: "ble_hourly_avg")

from(bucket: "paxcounter")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "paxcounter")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => (r.channel == "4" or r.channel == "5") and r.kind == "live")
  |> yield(name: "rolling_24h")

from(bucket: "paxcounter")
  |> range(start: -24h)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "paxcounter")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.channel == "1" and r.kind == "live")
  |> last()
